output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?film WHERE {
  ?director wdt:P106 wd:Q1617676 .
  ?director rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(LANG(?name) = 'en')
  FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(?name) , "laxman[[:space:]]*utekar|lakshman[[:space:]]*utekar" , "i"))
  ?film wdt:P57 ?director .
  ?film wdt:P364 wd:Q1889 .
  ?film wdt:P577 ?date .
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 1
